raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "California's education bills aim to protect immigrant and undocumented students by prohibiting immigration enforcement officers from entering school sites without proper identification.",
    "The California Safe Haven Schools Act aims to support undocumented students and their families.",
    "The Strengthen Charter School Oversight and Accountability bill seeks to enhance transparency and accountability in charter school operations.",
    "The Fair Pay for Educators Act proposes state funding targets to increase teacher and classified school employee salaries by 50 percent over the next decade.",
    "The Mandatory School Board Training on Budget and Fiscal Issues bill requires training for members of school district governing boards on fiscal issues.",
    "The School Employee Catastrophic Leave bill allows school employees to transfer catastrophic leave to colleagues affected by wildfires.",
    "The Education Workforce Housing bill aims to streamline the process for developing workforce housing to address the staffing crisis in California's education workforce.",
    "The Early Childhood Education bill seeks to ensure Commission membership has expertise on Early Childhood Education issues by adding voting members representing that field.",
    "The California Student Teacher Support Grant Program is intended to compensate teacher candidates during student teaching hours.",
    "The English Learner Teacher Credentialing bill allows local educational agencies to develop programs for preparing teachers to teach English Learners and provide bilingual instruction.",
    "The Educational Workforce Housing bill establishes a revolving loan account to assist local educational agencies with housing projects for educational workforce."
  ]
}
```
